mapper.select: SELECT id, msg_id, msg_key, topic, tag, action_type, body, send_status, consume_status, retry_count, max_retry, next_retry_time, error_msg, create_by, create_time FROM mq_message_log WHERE send_status = 2 AND retry_count < max_retry AND next_retry_time <= NOW() ORDER BY next_retry_time ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE mq_message_log SET send_status = #{sendStatus}, msg_id = #{msgId}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mq_message_log SET consume_status = #{consumeStatus}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = NOW() WHERE msg_key = #{msgKey} AND consume_status != 1
UPDATE mq_message_log SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_time = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL POWER(2, retry_count) MINUTE), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
